name: Bennett
title: Trial by Fire
description: A good-natured adventurer from Mondstadt who's unfortunately extremely unlucky.

constellations.name: Grand Expectation
description: **Fantastic Voyage**'s ATK increase no longer has an HP restriction, and gains an additional 20% of Bennett's Base ATK.

constellations.name: Impasse Conqueror
description: When Bennett's HP falls below 70%, his Energy Recharge is increased by 30%.

constellations.name: Unstoppable Fervor
description: Increases the Level of **Passion Overload** by 3.

constellations.name: Unexpected Odyssey
description: Using a Normal Attack as the second attack of **Passion Overload**'s Charge Level 1 will perform a follow-up attack.
This additional attack does 135% of the second attack's DMG.

constellations.name: True Explorer
description: Increases the Level of **Fantastic Voyage** by 3.

constellations.name: Fire Ventures With Me
description: Sword, Claymore, or Polearm-wielding characters inside **Fantastic Voyage**'s radius gain a 15% **Pyro DMG Bonus** and their weapons are infused with **Pyro**.

charged: Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.
plunge: Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.

elemental_skill.name: Passion Overload
description: Bennett puts all his fire and passion for adventuring into his sword. Results may vary based on how fired up he is...

sections.title: Press
text: A single, swift flame strike that deals Pyro DMG.

sections.title: Hold (Short)
text: Charges up, resulting in different effects when unleashed based on the Charge Level.
▸ Level 1: Strikes twice, dealing **Pyro DMG** and launching opponents.
▸ Level 2: Unleashes 3 consecutive attacks that deal impressive **Pyro DMG**, but the last attack triggers an explosion that launches both Bennett and the enemy.
Bennett takes no damage from being launched.

elemental_burst.name: Fantastic Voyage
description: Bennett performs a jumping attack that deals **Pyro DMG**, creating an Inspiration Field.

sections.title: Inspiration Field
text: ▸ If the health of a character within the AoE is equal to or falls below 70%, their health will continuously regenerate. The amount of HP restored scales off Bennett's Max HP.
▸ If the health of a character within the AoE is higher than 70%, they gain an ATK Bonus that is based on Bennett's Base ATK.
▸ Imbues characters within the AoE with **Pyro**.

passives.name: Fearnaught
description: Within the area created by **Fantastic Voyage**, **Passion Overload** takes on the following effects:
▸ Bennett will not be launched by the effects of Charge Level 2.

passives.name: It Should Be Safe...
description: Decreases gliding Stamina consumption for your own party members by 20%.
Not stackable with Passive Talents that provide the exact same effects.
